description: This engaging template is a great way to share information and inspire someone to give an animal a home. This customizable template can be used by a animal shelter, rescue center, or individual. It  has plenty of space to share photos, content, and call to actions. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: I'm a Product Designer passionate about creating meaningful, relevant and inclusive solutions for people.
